narrative:
Garfield-Heights municipal court district has 55,450 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.8% D−R vs +25.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
